c.d: Refers to the intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's interface and features, allowing users to quickly create collages without a steep learning curve.
The number and diversity of pre-designed templates and customizable layouts offered, enabling users to find the perfect base for their collage.
The extent to which users can personalize their collages, including options for adjusting spacing, borders, backgrounds, text, stickers, and filters.
The presence of built-in photo editing tools such as cropping, rotating, color adjustment, and special effects to enhance individual photos within the collage.
The ability to directly share collages to social media platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, and others.
The balance between features available in the free version and those locked behind a premium subscription, affecting accessibility for casual users.
The incorporation of AI-driven tools like automatic collage generation, smart layouts, object removal, and AI filters to streamline the collage creation process.
